info.name: Glenmoor Gemini Sprite Batch
info.description: Hand-authored Gemini-centered workflow that generates per-direction sprite grids, crops them to the locked 96-frame atlas contract, and stitches the final battle atlas.
info.runtimeContract: 128x128 frames, 1536x1024 atlas, 12x8 layout, north/east/south/west direction order, pivot 64,108
